title: Unity Software Revenue 2019-2025 Historical Data
text: Historical Revenue Trend: 2019: $284 million. 2020: $540 million (90% growth). 2021: $1,084 million (101% growth). 2022: $1,910 million (76% growth). 2023: $2,187 million (14% growth). 2024: $1,813 million (-17% decline). 2025: $2,038 million (12% growth). Recent Trajectory: After significant growth through 2022, Unity experienced a challenging 2024 with revenue declining 17% YoY due to advertising headwinds, privacy shifts, and legacy IronSource integration challenges. However, the company returned to growth in 2025 with 12% YoY increase. Strategic Portfolio Revenue (2024): $1,723 million, excluding non-strategic elements. This segment showed more stability than reported revenue. Earnings Trends: Adjusted EBITDA improved dramatically to $390 million in 2024 (21% margin) from $186 million in 2023, showing operational leverage and cost discipline. Free Cash Flow: Increased to $286 million in 2024 from $222 million in 2023, demonstrating improving cash generation despite revenue headwinds.
